Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Interrogatory Answers, Response To Document Request And Attendance At Deposition.
Off Calendar Dec-14-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Sylvia Reback's Motion To Compel Interrogatory Answers, Response To Document Request, and Attendance At Deposition is denied as to the special interrogatories. The lack of a separate statement and the paraphrasing of the interrogatories are inadequate. However, counsel are advised that the court believes that certain responses must be supplemented. As to the documents, Defendant is ordered to complete production within 20 days of notice of this order. Counsel shall meet and confer and set a date for the deposition of Gary Carrol for a date no later than January 12, 2007. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-26-2006 Set For Trial On Apr-30-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Apr-11-07 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 514
